parameters.name: X-Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Optional. Pass a unique key per logical charge to safely retry this request without creating duplicate transactions. The same key returns the original transaction for 24h, scoped to the seller that owns the product.

201.description: The Transaction has been successfully created

get.summary: List transactions for the current seller
Get Transaction Status by GalaxPay ID (Public)

200.description: The Transaction has been successfully refunded

201.description: The Product has been successfully updated
The Product has been successfully created

get.summary: List customers for the current seller

get.description: Returns version, supported payment methods, webhook event catalog, and feature flags. Unauthenticated. Used by the Garu CLI `doctor` command and MCP server to introspect the API.

get.summary: Get tracking configuration for a product

garu-gateway.description: Autenticação via JWT. Token obtido através do endpoint de login (/api/auth/login). Usado principalmente pelo painel administrativo.

api-key.name: Authorization
api-key.description: Autenticação via chave de API (API Key). Insira sua chave no formato: Bearer sk_live_xxx (produção) ou Bearer sk_test_xxx (teste). Obtenha sua chave no Dashboard da Garu em Configurações > Desenvolvedores.

hasAccessToken.description: Whether the pixel has an access token configured

domainId.description: Domain ID for first-party pixel tracking
Domain ID for first-party pixel tracking

sellerId.description: Seller ID if this is a seller-level setting

productId.description: Product ID if this is a product-level setting

customer.description: Dados do cliente que está efetuando a compra

link.description: Link original de checkout (caso a cobrança venha de um link público)

affiliateId.description: ID do afiliado associado a esta venda

additionalInfo.description: Informações adicionais livres (metadata) anexadas à transação

productId.description: UUID do produto que está sendo cobrado

priceId.description: ID do preço de assinatura (apenas para transações de subscription; formato price_*)

CardInfo.description: Dados do cartão. Obrigatório apenas quando paymentMethodId = creditcard. ATENÇÃO: este endpoint recebe PAN + CVV em texto claro — use apenas do lado servidor em ambiente PCI-compliant.

trackingContext.description: Contexto de rastreamento (UTM, referer, fbclid, etc.)

checkoutSessionToken.description: Token opcional de uma Checkout Session previamente criada via API

amount.description: Refund amount in BRL (optional, full refund if not provided)

version.description: Semantic version of the backend (from package.json).

api_version.description: Public API version surfaced by the SDKs and MCP server.

payment_methods.description: Payment methods accepted by the API.

billing_intervals.description: Supported recurring billing intervals for subscriptions.

webhook_events.description: Full catalog of webhook event types that may be delivered to seller endpoints.

commission.description:
Commission percentage for this affiliation (can override product default).
Stored as a percentage value (e.g., 10 = 10%).

active.description:
Whether the affiliation is currently active.
Set to false when canceled via cancelAffiliation().

approved.description:
Whether the product owner (seller) has approved this affiliation.
Set to true via approveAffiliation() after reviewing the affiliate request.

accepted.description:
Whether the affiliate has accepted the affiliation terms.
Set during affiliation creation based on invite acceptance.
Note: Different from AffiliationInvite.accept which tracks invite acceptance.

canceledAt.description:
Timestamp when the affiliation was canceled.
Null if affiliation is still active.
Set by cancelAffiliation() along with active=false.

fee.description: Actual gateway fee charged by GalaxPay, in centavos (integer). PIX only.

document.description: CPF (11 dígitos) ou CNPJ (14 dígitos) sem pontuação

phone.description: Telefone com DDD, 10 ou 11 dígitos, sem formatação

state.description: Sigla do estado (UF) com 2 letras maiúsculas

cardNumber.description: Número do cartão sem espaços ou traços (13 a 19 dígitos)

expirationDate.description: Validade do cartão no formato YYYY-MM

holderName.description: Nome do titular exatamente como impresso no cartão
